summaryAm: በቀስታ እና በጽናት መጓዝ ወደ መድረሻ እንደሚያደርስ የሚያሳይ ለልጆች የተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በቀስታ ብንሄድም በጽናት ከቀጠልን መድረስ እንችላለን።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with a gentle ending.

pages.textAm: በአንድ ፀሐያማ ጠዋት ኤሊው በአረንጓዴ መንገድ ላይ በቀስታ ይጓዝ ነበር። እሱ ቀስ ቢልም ሁልጊዜ ይቀጥል ነበር።
pages.textEn: One sunny morning, the tortoise walked slowly along a green path.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A calm tortoise walking slowly on a green sunny path with warm storybook light.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ በፍጥነት እየዘለለ መጣ። “ኤሊ ሆይ፣ እኔ ፈጣን ነኝ፤ አንተ ግን በጣም ቀስ ትሄዳለህ!” አለ።
pages.textEn: The hare came hopping quickly and said he was very fast.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A lively hare hopping near the calm tortoise, playful but not mean.

pages.textAm: ኤሊው ፈገግ አለ። “እኔ ቀስ እሄዳለሁ፣ ግን አልቆምም። እስከ ዛፉ ድረስ እንወዳደር?” ብሎ ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: The tortoise smiled and asked if they could race to the tree.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise smiling calmly while pointing toward a far tree finish line.

pages.textAm: ጓደኞቻቸው “ጀምሩ!” አሉ። ጥንቸሉ ፈጥኖ ሮጠ፣ ኤሊው ግን በቀስታ በቀስታ መጓዝ ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: Their friends said, Start! The hare ran fast, and the tortoise began slowly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Animal friends cheer as the hare runs quickly and the tortoise starts steadily.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ በጣም ፈጥኖ ስለሄደ ኤሊውን ከኋላ አላየውም። “ትንሽ እረፍታለሁ” ብሎ በአበቦች አጠገብ ተቀመጠ።
pages.textEn: The hare ran far ahead and sat near the flowers to rest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The hare resting beside flowers on the path while the finish tree is far away.

pages.textAm: ኤሊው ግን አልቆመም። “በቀስታ በቀስታ፣ እቀጥላለሁ” እያለ መንገዱን ቀጠለ።
pages.textEn: The tortoise did not stop. Slowly and steadily, he kept going.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise steadily walking past flowers with a peaceful determined expression.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ ሲነቃ ኤሊው ወደ መድረሻው ተቃርቦ ነበር። ጥንቸሉ ፈጥኖ ሮጠ፣ ግን ኤሊው መጀመሪያ ደረሰ።
pages.textEn: When the hare woke up, the tortoise was already near the finish.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise reaching the tree finish line as the hare runs kindly behind.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ “አሁን ተማርኩ፤ ፍጥነት ብቻ አይበቃም” አለ። ኤሊውም “በጽናት መቀጠል ያሸንፋል” ብሎ ፈገግ አለ።
pages.textEn: The hare learned that speed alone is not enough, and the tortoise smiled.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise and hare smiling together as friends after the race.
